TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-pear_syulan

S.FORM: yau yau kenanem lazat matiw qimudu tanaungan nani.
S.TRANSL: 有一個人去山上採橘子。
There is a person who went to pick oranges in the mountain.

S.FORM: yau kenanem z mala ya e mkawit tu sizi mlaziw nani.
S.TRANSL: 有一個人牽著羊經過。
There is a person who pulled a goat and passed by.

S.FORM: antangi yau pama kenanem sunis qazitinsya mlaziw nani.
S.TRANSL: 還有一個小孩騎腳踏車經過。
There is still another child who rode a bike and passed by.

S.FORM: titaanna yau mulu ta qanasan nani.
S.TRANSL: 他看到籃子裡有橘子。
He saw that there were oranges in the basket.

S.FORM: puniR uzusa qanas nani.
S.TRANSL: 兩個籃子是滿的。
The two baskets were full.

S.FORM: alaanna ti sunis ‘nay mala tu izau pizianna ta kitinsyaan.
S.TRANSL: 小孩拿了(橘子)放在腳踏車上。
The child took (oranges) and put (them) onto the bike.

S.FORM: mala sunis ‘nay tmanan timngu talazanan siqatazai tu tazungan sunis nani mzuqud ti tu betu msuRaw ti.
S.TRANSL: (小孩)撞到石頭跌倒了。
(The child) stumbled over a stone.

S.FORM: niz ti tmibuq ‘nay muluna ta lazanan nani.
S.TRANSL: 他所有的橘子都掉到路上了。
All his oranges fell onto the road.

S.FORM: yau kintulu sunis Runanay mlaziw.
S.TRANSL: 有三個男孩經過。
There are three boys who passed by.

S.FORM: pangmuanna ti kmyala pizianna ta qanasan.
S.TRANSL: 他們幫忙撿(橘子),放到籃子裡。
They helped to pick up (the oranges) and put (them) into the basket.

S.FORM: pangmuanna kmyala taqanasan nani.
S.TRANSL: 他們幫忙撿(橘子),放到籃子裡。
They helped to pick up (the oranges) and put (them) into the basket.

S.FORM: kalinguanna ti qubuna nani.
S.TRANSL: 他忘了他的帽子。
He forgot his hat.

S.FORM: wiya ti sunis ‘nay smaqay nani.
S.TRANSL: 小孩走開了。
The child walked away.

S.FORM: timngu titaanna kintulu ‘nay sunis ‘nay qubuna nani.
S.TRANSL: 那三個小孩看到他的帽子。
The three children saw his hat.

S.FORM: qasana muman bula tu qubuna nani bulaanna ti sunis ‘nay tu utulu mulu.
S.TRANSL: 小孩給他們三顆橘子。
The child gave them three oranges.

S.FORM: saqanannumi zinna nani.
S.TRANSL: ‘給你們吃的,’ 他這樣說。
‘For you to eat,’ said he.

S.FORM: wiya ti kintulu sunis ‘nay.
S.TRANSL: 那三個小孩離開了。
The three children left.

S.FORM: mlaziw qaya tu e qimulu ay ‘nay lazat ‘nay nani.
S.TRANSL: (他們)經過採橘子的那個人。
(They) passed the person who was picking oranges.

S.FORM: sunis ‘nay qimulu ay lazat nani titaanna imu ni mai ti usiq qanas ‘nay mulu.
S.TRANSL: 他看到他們. 一籃橘子不見了。
He saw them. One basket of oranges was gone.

S.FORM: titaanna kinaw kintulu sisi yau qman tu mulu tu nibulaanna tu qaqananna qaniyau nani.
S.TRANSL: 他看到三個(小孩)在吃橘子,小孩給他們的,要給他們吃的。
He saw the three (children) eating oranges, which were given by the child and were for them to eat.

S.FORM: mana mai ti mana mai ti mulu ‘nay usiq qanas zinna.
S.TRANSL: ‘為什麼一籃橘子不見了?’ 他這樣說。
‘Why is one basket of oranges gone?’ said he.
